view.renderModeSolidHint: Pipeline physique avec profondeur. Le bokeh peut être activé en caméra perspective.
view.renderModeLuminousHint: Pipeline de superposition énergétique. Le mélange additif est actif et le bokeh est indisponible.

canvasNav.fitTooltip: Adapter l'image aux limites du canevas
canvasNav.clearTooltip: Nettoyer les particules et éléments de scène

audioPlayer.decodeFailed: Échec du décodage. Essayez un autre fichier.

tooltips.inputGain: Technical term: Input Gain. Scales all amplitude before analysis.
tooltips.defaultParticleSize: Technical term: Default Size Multiplier. Scales all particle sizes after rule outputs.
tooltips.maxParticles: Technical term: Capacity. Total GPU object slots.
tooltips.particlesByFrame: Technical term: Objects By Frame. Number of log-frequency spawn buckets shared by light particles and lines.
tooltips.fluxWindowFrames: Technical term: Flux Window Frames. Rolling frame window for activity averaging.
tooltips.adjustForHumanHearing: Technical term: ISO 226 Equal-Loudness Compensation. Applies perceptual weighting to per-frequency volume.
tooltips.frequencyRange: Technical terms: Freq Norm Min / Freq Norm Max. Physical frequency normalization range.
tooltips.volumeRange: Technical terms: Per-Bin Magnitude Min / Max. Per-frequency volume normalization.
tooltips.instabilityRange: Technical terms: Per-Bin Phase Deviation Min / Max. Phase instability normalization.
tooltips.attackSharpnessRange: Technical terms: Per-Bin Attack Time Min / Max. Attack-time normalization.
tooltips.energyRange: Technical terms: Global RMS Energy Min / Max. Frame-wide RMS normalization.
tooltips.sharpnessRange: Technical terms: Spectral Centroid Min / Max. Spectral sharpness normalization.
tooltips.activityRange: Technical terms: Per-Bin Spectral Flux Min / Max and Global Spectral Flux Min / Max. Controls both detail and global activity ranges.
tooltips.noisinessRange: Technical terms: Spectral Flatness Min / Max. Noise-vs-tone normalization.

paramDescriptions.inputGain: Global input gain scaler applied before analysis and spawning.
paramDescriptions.fftSize: FFT analysis size. Higher values increase frequency detail.
paramDescriptions.fluxWindowFrames: Rolling frame window used to smooth activity detection.
paramDescriptions.adjustForHumanHearing: Apply ISO 226 equal-loudness compensation to per-frequency volume.
paramDescriptions.binMagnitudeNormMin: Normalization lower bound for per-bin volume.
paramDescriptions.binMagnitudeNormMax: Normalization upper bound for per-bin volume.
paramDescriptions.binFluxNormMin: Normalization lower bound for per-frequency activity.
paramDescriptions.binFluxNormMax: Normalization upper bound for per-frequency activity.
paramDescriptions.binPhaseDeviationNormMin: Normalization lower bound for per-bin instability.
paramDescriptions.binPhaseDeviationNormMax: Normalization upper bound for per-bin instability.
paramDescriptions.binAttackTimeNormMin: Normalization lower bound for per-bin attack sharpness.
paramDescriptions.binAttackTimeNormMax: Normalization upper bound for per-bin attack sharpness.
paramDescriptions.globalRmsNormMin: Normalization lower bound for frame energy.
paramDescriptions.globalRmsNormMax: Normalization upper bound for frame energy.
paramDescriptions.spectralCentroidNormMin: Normalization lower bound for spectral sharpness.
paramDescriptions.spectralCentroidNormMax: Normalization upper bound for spectral sharpness.
paramDescriptions.globalSpectralFluxNormMin: Normalization lower bound for frame-level activity.
paramDescriptions.globalSpectralFluxNormMax: Normalization upper bound for frame-level activity.
paramDescriptions.spectralFlatnessNormMin: Normalization lower bound for spectral noisiness.
paramDescriptions.spectralFlatnessNormMax: Normalization upper bound for spectral noisiness.
paramDescriptions.defaultParticleSize: Global multiplier applied to all particle sizes after rule outputs.
paramDescriptions.canvasWidth: Explicit canvas width in Three.js world units. 0 keeps automatic sizing.
paramDescriptions.canvasHeight: Explicit canvas height in Three.js world units. 0 keeps automatic sizing.
paramDescriptions.canvasScale: Display zoom of the canvas on screen. Does not change render resolution.
paramDescriptions.defaultBackgroundHue: Base background hue used before background rules are applied.
paramDescriptions.defaultBackgroundSaturation: Base background saturation used before background rules are applied.
paramDescriptions.defaultBackgroundLightness: Base background lightness used before background rules are applied.
paramDescriptions.maxParticles: Maximum total particle slots in GPU buffers. Higher values allow longer painting trails.
paramDescriptions.particlesByFrame: Number of log-frequency spawn buckets per frame. Step ratio is k = (freqMax / freqMin)^(1/N).
paramDescriptions.cameraProjection: Choose between axonometric (orthographic) and perspective camera projection.
paramDescriptions.cameraPosX: Camera position X in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraPosY: Camera position Y in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraPosZ: Camera position Z in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraTargetX: Camera target X in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraTargetY: Camera target Y in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraTargetZ: Camera target Z in world units.
paramDescriptions.cameraAngleOfView: Perspective camera field of view in degrees.
paramDescriptions.postProcessEnabled: Master switch for all post-processing effects.
paramDescriptions.bloomThreshold: Luminance threshold before bloom is applied.
paramDescriptions.persistMode: Momentary: canvas fades each frame. Painting: marks accumulate.

rules.title: Règles
rules.mathPlaceholder: Tapez des maths ou un nombre
rules.slotInsertHint: Insérer des données audio ou saisir une valeur

functionHints.clamp: Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value)). Limite une valeur entre un minimum et un maximum.
functionHints.pow: Math.pow(value, exponent). Élève une valeur à une puissance.
functionHints.lerp: start + (end - start) * amount. Interpolation linéaire entre début et fin.
functionHints.smoothstep: Fondu de seuil adouci. Transition progressive de 0 à 1 entre edge0 et edge1.
functionHints.mod: ((value % max) + max) % max. Modulo positif pour boucler dans une plage.
functionHints.sin: Math.sin(value). Sortie d'onde sinusoïdale à partir d'un angle.
functionHints.cos: Math.cos(value). Sortie d'onde cosinus à partir d'un angle.
functionHints.step: value < edge ? 0.0 : 1.0. Fonction de seuil binaire.
functionHints.if: condition ? true_val : false_val. Choix conditionnel entre deux valeurs.
